title: Apparatus for facilitating positioning a person in supine sniff position
abstract: Embodiments of an apparatus for supporting the neck and head of a user for airway management are described. The apparatus can include a base support section (101, 303), which can rest on a supporting surface (207), a front side, two opposing sides and a back side with the base support section (101, 303) being dimensioned between about 25-26 inches in width, between about 16-17 inches in depth and about 6 inches in height with a separate and removable and replaceable head/neck support section (302).
